description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the agilob/qt5clanggpp Docker image. Define two stages: build and test. Add a build job in the build stage that runs qmake then make -j4. Add a test job in the test stage that runs qmake, make -j4, cd src/test/, qmake, make, and ./test -platform offscreen. No caches, artifacts, or special triggers are needed.
